mosinstall.name: Remository Quick Links
mosinstall.author: Benjamin Searles
mosinstall.description:
Remository Quick Links v1.1.0

An admin module to display quick links to the Remository Component in your backend header.

Be sure to publsih Remository Quick Links module in the "header" position!  (click here to publish it)

param.name: manage_containers
param.label: Manage Containers
param.description: Display the 'Manage Containers' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: manage_files
param.label: Manage Files
param.description: Display the 'Manage Files' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: manage_groups
param.label: Manage Groups
param.description: Display the 'Manage Groups' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: approve_uploads
param.label: Approve Uploads
param.description: Display the 'Approve Uploads' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: configuration
param.label: Configuration
param.description: Display the 'Configuration' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: handle_unlinked
param.label: Handle Unlinked Files
param.description: Display the 'Handle Unlinked Files/Orphans' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: bulk_add
param.label: Bulk Add From Server
param.description: Display the 'Bulk Add' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: add_structure
param.label: Add Whole Structure From Server
param.description: Display the 'Add Whole Structure From Server' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: list_missing
param.label: List Missing Files
param.description: Display the 'List Missing Files' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: recalculate_counts
param.label: Recalculate File Counts
param.description: Display the 'Recalculate File Counts' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: reset_counts
param.label: Reset All Download Counts
param.description: Display the 'Reset All Download Counts To Zero' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: remove_logs
param.label: Remove Old Log Entries
param.description: Display the 'Remove Old Log File Entries' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: check_thumbnails
param.label: Check Thumbnail Integrity
param.description: Display the 'Check Thumbnail Integrity' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: convert_320
param.label: Convert Pre 3.20 Database
param.description: Display the 'Convert Pre 3.20 Database' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: convert_340
param.label: Convert Pre 3.40 Database
param.description: Display the 'Convert Pre 3.40 Database' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: statistics
param.label: Statistics
param.description: Display the 'Statistics' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: about_remository
param.label: About Remository
param.description: Display the 'About Remository' Quick Links Menu Item?

param.name: support
param.label: Support And Development Services
param.description: Display the 'Support And Development Services' Quick Links Menu Item?
